prompt: Generate a single self-contained prefab model: a modular rocky cliff ridge terrain piece for an original classic military RTS isometric battlefield. Keep the shape broad and usable as a battlefield map module, with a clear vertical cliff face, angular dark gray stone strata, chipped rugged ledges, flatter uneven terrain on top for blending, moss patches, and brown dirt in crevices. Game-ready low-poly-ish geometry with textured material/PBR look. No text, no logos, no symbols, no faction markings, no characters, no vehicles, no copyrighted IP.
